headline: Truist Cuts PT on Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX) to $90 From $92
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) is one of the most oversold healthcare stocks to invest in. Truist cut the price target on Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) to $90 from $92 on April 15 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. The rating update came as part of a broader research note previewing fiscal Q1 results in […]

headline: EY on the current state of the medtech industry
summary: OEMs continue to prioritise high-growth segments of the medtech industry such as pulsed-field ablation (PFA), while conflict in the Middle East is impacting IPO activity.
